notes.title: Mains Important Themes
notes.description: This document contains important thematic questions asked in BPSC Mains, along with comprehensive solutions.

notes.title: Ancient BPSC
notes.description: This PDF condenses Bihar's ancient history, from the Paleolithic Age to the Gupta Empire, for the Prelims and Mains syllabi.

notes.title: Bihar Interview Notes
notes.description: This document was prepared for the interview stage and covers recent facts, figures, schemes, initiatives, and other miscellaneous topics.

notes.title: Economy BPSC
notes.description: This document provides an overview of Bihar's economic profile. Update the data and figures when preparing for the examination.

notes.title: Geography BPSC
notes.description: This short PDF covers Bihar-specific geographical features, including landforms, minerals, and soils, relevant to the Prelims and Mains syllabi.

notes.title: Medieval BPSC
notes.description: This three-page document covers the important medieval dynasties that ruled Bihar.

notes.title: Modern BPSC
notes.description: This document comprehensively covers modern history events, personalities, associations, and literature associated with Bihar that are relevant to the examination.

actual.title: Essay
actual.description: This is the actual Essay examination-day answer copy issued by the commission for the 70th BPSC Mains examination.

practice.title: Essay
